creator: mainland@eecs.harvard.edu
text:
Somehow the How-To-Repeat field from the web submission did not make it
through.

The following commands resulted in an instant kernel panic:

ifconfig wlan0 create wlandev ath0 wlanmode adhoc
ifconfig wlan0 inet 192.168.0.1/24 ssid foo mode 11g channel 6 bssid
12:00:00:00:00:00
